nodes.name: sciona.mint.axial_attention
nodes.description: Source-aligned MINT RowSelfAttention replay atoms for 4D MSA tensors.
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms replay upstream MINT RowSelfAttention with explicit q/k/v/out projection parameters.
nodes.critic_notes: Remediated after pubrev-019: atoms now require 4D MSA input shaped (num_rows, num_cols, batch_size, embed_dim), learned projection weights, MINT row aggregation, padding semantics, and no-grad batched-forward behavior.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: The upstream source defines a parameterized nn.Module; these atoms expose a stateless core API so projection state remains explicit in the atom surface.

nodes.name: row_self_attention
nodes.description: Replay MINT RowSelfAttention over a 4D MSA tensor using explicit query, key, value, and output projection parameters.
nodes.type_signature: (x: torch.Tensor, q_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, k_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, v_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, out_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, num_heads: int, q_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, k_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, v_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, out_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, self_attn_mask: torch.Tensor | None = None, self_attn_padding_mask: torch.Tensor | None = None, dropout_p: float = 0.0, max_tokens_per_msa: int = 65536, training: bool = False) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Source-aligned stateless replay of upstream MINT RowSelfAttention.
nodes.critic_notes: The atom follows upstream projection, row aggregation, padding mask, attention shape, and no-grad batched-forward semantics; self_attn_mask remains unsupported because upstream raises NotImplementedError.

nodes.name: rowselfattention
nodes.description: Backward-compatible lowercase atom exposing the same MINT RowSelfAttention replay contract.
nodes.type_signature: (x: torch.Tensor, q_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, k_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, v_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, out_proj_weight: torch.Tensor, num_heads: int, q_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, k_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, v_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, out_proj_bias: torch.Tensor | None = None, self_attn_mask: torch.Tensor | None = None, self_attn_padding_mask: torch.Tensor | None = None, dropout_p: float = 0.0, max_tokens_per_msa: int = 65536, training: bool = False) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Compatibility FQDN for the source-aligned RowSelfAttention core.
nodes.critic_notes: This replaces the previous NumPy approximation; upstream MINT defines only the Torch module, so the remediated lowercase atom intentionally uses the Torch source contract.
